## Description
Brief description of what needs to be implemented.

## Requirements
- [ ] Notebook created in `notebooks/` or script in `scripts/`
- [ ] Code runs without errors from top to bottom
- [ ] Proper data preprocessing (if applicable)
- [ ] Model implemented and tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Evaluation metrics included (accuracy, precision, recall, F1)
- [ ] Visualizations added (plots, confusion matrix, etc.)
- [ ] Results saved to `results/` (if applicable)
- [ ] Code is clean and well-commented
- [ ] Pull request opened and reviewed

## Design Notes
Any relevant implementation details, assumptions, or references.

## Due Date
YYYY-MM-DD
